rows.label: qev026901_MSG0001
rows.name: Hey, you there! Yes, you, y-o-u! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026901_MSG0002
rows.name:
You look like you've got a lot of free time on
your hands, don't you? In that case, why don't
you spend some meaningful time with me? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026901_JNK0010
rows.name: Refuse[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026901_SEL0011
rows.name: Say you're already covered.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026901_JNK0020
rows.name: Consider[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026901_SEL0021
rows.name: Express interest in this "meaningful time."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026901_MSG0003
rows.name:
Oh please, what are you misunderstanding!
If you're talking about romance, I'm
fully covered on that front myself! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026901_MSG0004
rows.name:
We're both BLADEs. You can probably
guess what it means when one of us
approaches the other like this, right? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026901_MSG0005
rows.name:
Jeez! You're such a tease! Oh?
Or could it be that you're
just feeling a little shy? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026901_MSG0006
rows.name:
Oh, aren't you quick to
understand? I love honest kids. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026901_MSG0007
rows.name:
But unfortunately, I'm not
hitting on you. Save the fun
stuff for next time, okay! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026901_MSG0008
rows.name:
Actually, I've been directly entrusted with
a job from the government, you see. And I'd
like to ask for your help with it. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026901_MSG0009
rows.name:
I think you've probably heard the rumors,
but... Didn't some team recently take down a
real big shot in the White Tree Continent? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026901_MSG0010
rows.name:
It seems its wreckage has just been left sitting
there, and for the sake of future research and
countermeasures, they need to recover it. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026901_MSG0011
rows.name:
Yep! In other words, that's my
l-i-t-t-l-e f-a-v-o-r this time! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026901_MSG0012
rows.name:
I'll have him give you the
detailed explanation. He's the
analyst I hired for this job. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026901_MSG0013
rows.name:
Hmm... With this kind of energy, it's
kind of hard for me to take over, jan! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026901_MSG0014
rows.name:
But what I'm about to say is a
super serious matter, jan! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026901_MSG0015
rows.name:
How rude! I was being
perfectly serious too! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026901_MSG0016
rows.name:
It seems that "big shot" that got
taken down was actually a
super-massive Growth weapon, ne. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026901_MSG0017
rows.name:
We underestimated them as just a criminal
syndicate, but they actually possess quite
impressive technological capabilities, jan. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026901_MSG0018
rows.name:
As Ma-non, it would be a bit, you
know, to just leave that alone. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026901_MSG0019
rows.name:
So this time, we've decided to
proactively lend a hand, jan! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026901_MSG0020
rows.name:
Stop acting so high and mighty!
You really just want a share of
the leftover treasure, don't you? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026901_MSG0021
rows.name:
Shut up, jan! Even treasure is just
junk if you leave it alone, jan! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026901_MSG0022
rows.name:
Our cooperation is a noble and civilized activity that
practices a tireless challenge toward technological
development and a "mottainai" spirit of avoiding waste, jan! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026901_MSG0023
rows.name:
Ah, yeah, yeah. Enough with the excuses,
just get on with the story already. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026901_MSG0024
rows.name:
Otherwise, someone else is going
to snatch up our treasure! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026901_MSG0025
rows.name:
You've got some nerve saying that
after interrupting me yourself, jan. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026901_MSG0026
rows.name:
Well, whatever, jan.
I'll continue, jan! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026901_MSG0027
rows.name:
According to the intel, the parts that seem to be
the cockpit block and the engine section have more
or less retained their original shape, ne. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026901_MSG0028
rows.name:
Of course, it would be even better
if there are other parts too, ne. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026901_MSG0029
rows.name:
In short, we want you to bring back
everything that looks worthwhile, ne! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026901_MSG0030
rows.name:
Naturally we don't need complete
garbage, but we'll leave that
judgment up to you, jan! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026901_MSG0031
rows.name:
Once you've got that, head
out with enthusiasm, jan! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026901_MSG0032
rows.name:
Time is money, jan!
Speed is power, jan! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026901_MSG0033
rows.name: Now, dash, dash! A fierce dash, jan! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026901_MSG0034
rows.name:
I'm expecting great things from
you, too! I'll be waiting! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026901_MSG0036
rows.name:
The cockpit block and the engine
wreckage seem to be in a rather
troublesome location, so... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026901_MSG0037
rows.name:
I think this is going to be quite
a dangerous mission, but... I'm
sure you'll be fine, right? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026901_MSG0038
rows.name:
That big shot's wreckage that fell
in the White Tree Continent. Go
recover it perfectly for us! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026901_MSG0039
rows.name:
Could it be that the mission
was a success...? Hehe, I knew
you'd be able to do it. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026901_MSG0040
rows.name:
Is this what they call a woman's intuition?
The moment I laid eyes on you, it just clicked
that you would definitely be alright. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026901_MSG0041
rows.name:
...Now then, hand the wreckage
over to Rutantan and let's have
him investigate it quickly. [ST:wait ]
